docs.title: Documentation
docs.description: Guides and references for integrating with GGID

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started with GGID
gettingStarted.step1Body:
Run GGID using Docker:

docker run -d -p 8080:8080 -p 3000:3000 ggid/ggid-all-in-one:latest
gettingStarted.step2Body: Navigate to http://localhost:3000 and login with admin@ggid.dev / Admin@123456
gettingStarted.step3Body: Use the Console or API to create users and assign roles.
gettingStarted.step4Body: Choose your authentication strategy (passkey-first, password, or hybrid) and optionally configure SSO.
gettingStarted.step5Body: Use one of our SDKs to integrate GGID authentication into your application.

api.title: API Reference
api.description: Browse the full REST API via Swagger UI
api.swaggerDesc: Interactive API documentation with try-it-now capability
api.authDesc: All API calls require a Bearer token obtained from POST /api/v1/auth/login
